message:
fix(raptorq,plan): test fixes and RewritePolicy struct migration

- pipeline.rs: Use 1KB test data to avoid k=1 edge case where L overhead
  exceeds simple repair_overhead calculation
- certificate.rs: Fix RewritePolicy fingerprint hashing and verification
  after migration from enum to struct with boolean fields

Closes bd-3cb2 (decoder Gaussian elimination fix was in prior sync commit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
